query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `issueLinks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `issueId` int NOT NULL,
  `linkedEntityType` enum('requirement','task','dependency') NOT NULL,
  `linkedEntityId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `issueLinks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4FzqaZAU5mRtC.root --database j37MQHBuWbY6PMBApJWnKm --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `issueLinks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `issueId` int NOT NULL,
  `linkedEntityType` enum('requirement','task','dependency') NOT NULL,
  `linkedEntityId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `issueLinks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
